header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: Manage your app preferences and lightweight local data.

account.title: Account
account.description: Your signed-in profile and current project quota plan.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose the interface theme. Current resolved theme is {{resolved}}.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Review and clear the local notification history shown from the top navigation bell.

guidedTours.title: Guided Tours
guidedTours.description: Reset onboarding hints for Map, Workbench, and Analysis so they can be replayed.
guidedTours.resetStatus: Guided tours will appear again when you open Map, Workbench, or Analysis.

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.description: Clear the local recent-project activity cache used to order familiar work.
